textByHash.0591a5f05e8385b6c53068a8369167c38bacf560: Headman Ur-tag, I cannot stress enough how important it is that this train link be completed on time. The mining companies have taken out considerable loans...
textByHash.062acef548747e23211c13aea7013e329fc211d0: What are you babbling about? Everyone was cleared out of the tunnel when we completed work. There's no reason to stop the train.
textByHash.1340f8ffa2bbc10beb88ceb880d5329be91c9f5b: Perhaps now we can get this finished quickly and get on with laying the tracks.
textByHash.1cc2a96e90cf66a2d64c3f363a634e443bf117c4: And it would be finished by now, except that they found some old goblin bones they want to dig up.
textByHash.27c3accecc53dc5fcc9bc15b014efdb364c699a8: It will be the pinnacle of dwarven engineering! A great leap forward from the old steam-powered minecarts! A monument to the power and ingenuity of the Consortium!
textByHash.3ec5f29c00ca6dc1026b8df1106537ddc4744ece: I can't stand these goblins sometimes! I come up with suggestions to make their city more efficient, and they just say it would spoil their precious way of life!
textByHash.403978b3c4a07abcfd79b8109ce93114f74395e9: Oh, and I hear you saved someone's life as well. Well done on that count too.
textByHash.7222796edc131e02a73cc1b91a8ce0168e6d4ad8: Trade with the goblins is going well at the moment. It's a pity they don't seem as interested in our beer as in your food, though!
textByHash.85176467ae5523bbb280642c547ddf15b32bddc9: Thank you for helping with the dig! Ur-tag tells me it will be finished soon, and then we will be able to resume work!
textByHash.9376515909d98acd798a640ffad7438c1426982d: Shh! What if they're a human spy come to steal our engineering secrets?
textByHash.a57449e6aa90ee2900f4a2c25e7a1a08c7f0f564: I miss Keldagrim. This city is all very well, but no one makes an underground city like the dwarves!
textByHash.ac7eeac4065fce5ebb301b7487378fbd749ad268: But now we meet these goblins underground, and they're no threat at all. Maybe this will herald a change in our relations with the surface goblins as well.
textByHash.c8437798fac379ef82aef86d6f2d20ede3d4eebe: It's funny... whenever we dwarves have ventured onto the surface, we've found ourselves at war with the goblins there.
textByHash.d6b65c33905eed7b0a44095b5b7f00ade0e4c1cf: I hope you're hurrying up with that archaeological dig. Every moment we wait wastes more of the Consortium's money!
textByHash.e2ea8c90e922ea1f8f411d979b2d22ca5152542e: I wish you could work more quickly. The new train link is very important to the dwarven economy.
textByHash.f8d99da433cfe283d906a6b0bdff03a7bb5c32a6: Thank you again for helping us complete the train link. Further delays would have cost the Consortium a lot of money.
textByHash.fa6effadf5456dc8a8218bb6ab331c8bbc32df8a: Thank you for helping with the dig! I hear that the work on the tunnel is now complete and the first train will be making the journey very soon!
